title: Bottom row strong fingers: V M B N C
description: Drop DOWN to the bottom row: index (V M B N) and middle (C)
text: move number brave climb clam combat nimble vivid become carbon
finger_focus: Bottom row index (V M B N) + middle (C)

tips.text: Bottom row, strong fingers first: index (V, M, B, N), middle (C)
Curl the fingers under to reach down, then return

tips.hint: Bottom row index (V M B N) + middle (C)

tips.text: Words: move, number, brave, become, carbon

tips.target: clam combat nimble vivid become carbon
tips.hint: Bottom row index (V M B N) + middle (C)

character_tips.anna: Bottom row, strong fingers first: V, M, B, N, then C. Curl and return.
character_tips.maxim: Index leads the bottom row too: V M B N, middle takes C.
character_tips.knopych: GOING DOWN! ⬇️ Strong fingers dive first!
character_tips.klavochka: Reaching low like picking flowers, my dear 🌻
